extensionDescription.message: Find exact text matches on the current page and make them easier to see with adjustable highlights.

panelSearchScopeHelp.message: To avoid performance impact on dynamically generated or very large pages, Better Search Highlighter limits how much text it loads. Enable Search all content when you want to search the entire page.

panelSearchAllContentWarning.message: Warning: this searches the page without content-size limits and may affect performance on some pages.

statusTextSafetyLimit.message: Search stopped at the page text safety limit.

statusNodeSafetyLimit.message: Search stopped at the DOM node safety limit.

statusFrameSafetyLimit.message: Search skipped some frames for safety.

statusMatchSafetyLimit.message: Too many matches. Results were limited for performance.

statusSearchAllContentHint.message: Enable Search all content to search without this limit.

shortcutUnassignedNotice.message: Shortcut is not assigned. Set it in Chrome shortcuts.
